name: EU Chancellor
title: Chancellor of the European Federation

compatibilityOverrides.reason: Transatlantic alliance and shared democratic values
Like-minded democracies with trade and climate cooperation
Russian aggression as existential security threat to Europe

biography: A consensus-builder representing the collective leadership of the European Federation, the EU Chancellor navigates the delicate balance of 27 member states with competing interests. Their ENFJ temperament drives a diplomatic, values-driven approach emphasizing multilateralism, climate action, and economic integration. Institutional constraints make bold unilateral action nearly impossible.
